column8: EA TGQ YCbCr->RGB16 LUT builder (calls PackPixelFromRGB into DAT_004d3930 base); port replaces full TGQ codec with Media Foundation IMFSourceReader, no 1:1 equiv
EA TGQ pixel packer w/ rounding+saturation per channel-bitcount (param_5/6/7); port has no software pixel-packer because MF decodes to native RGB32
EA TGQ alternate YCbCr LUT builder (calls PackYCbCrTableEntry); same target tables DAT_004d3930/d3d/d3f; port skips entirely via MF pipeline
EA TGQ 4-byte YCbCr packer with carry-down on negative components; trivial helper for BuildYCbCrColorTables, not needed in port
EA TGQ video-decoder init: QueryDirectDraw7 / palette malloc(0x400) / BuildColorConversionLUTs / saturation LUT g_fmvYcbcrSaturationLut; replaced by IMFSourceReader
